name: St. James's Place
ai_strategy_summary: St. James's Place is deploying AI to reduce adviser admin burden — not to replace advisers. The Advice Assistant (built with IntellectAI on Salesforce) compresses 60-90 minutes of post-meeting documentation into ~5 minutes and is expanding from ISA cases to pensions and protection. The Intelligent Investment Hub automates fund analytics, ESG intelligence, and factsheet generation. Head of AI Wenyu Bai: 'AI is the background assistant, but the value of advice still lies with the financial adviser.'

head_of_ai.name: Wenyu Bai
head_of_ai.title: Head of AI and Machine Learning

headline_metric: Advice Assistant compresses 90-min admin to 5 minutes across 4,920 advisers managing £190.2B FUM
headline_initiative: Advice Assistant (ISA → pensions/protection rollout) + Intelligent Investment Hub

advisor_productivity.headline: Advice Assistant compresses 60-90 minutes of post-meeting documentation to ~5 minutes — live for ISA cases, expanding to pensions and protection
advisor_productivity.detail: Built with SS&C Technologies and IntellectAI on Salesforce, the Advice Assistant uses NLP to interpret adviser notes from client meetings, automatically builds an advice file, checks recommendations against SJP's advice policy, and populates all documentation. Reduces a 60-90 minute admin process to ~5 minutes and saves 1-2 hours per case on back-office work. Currently live for ISA advice. Planned expansion to pensions, protection, and other products. Won the UK IT Industry Awards (Financial Services Project of the Year) and FSTech Best Financial Services IT Team (2023).
evidence: Advice Assistant: 60-90 minute documentation process reduced to ~5 minutes — IntellectAI/SJP, 2023-2024
Saves 1-2 hours per case on back-office documentation — IntellectAI case study

Won UK IT Industry Awards Financial Services Project of the Year + FSTech Best Financial Services IT Team — 2023

IntellectAI — SJP and IntellectAI receive coveted industry recognitions

research_content.headline: Intelligent Investment Hub: automated fund performance intelligence, sentiment analysis, ESG intelligence, and factsheet generation
research_content.detail: SJP's Intelligent Investment Hub, built with IntellectAI on Snowflake and Matillion, covers: fund performance intelligence, sentiment analysis of analyst reactions, automated fund comparison and commentary, auto-generation of fund fact sheets, and ESG intelligence. Deployed in the Investment Management division. SJ-GPT (GenAI tool for advisers to retrieve regulatory information) and Chat SJP (internal GPT-style assistant) are in development.
evidence: Intelligent Investment Hub: fund performance intelligence, sentiment analysis, automated factsheet generation, ESG intelligence — IntellectAI, June 2021+
SJ-GPT (regulatory Q&A for advisers) and Chat SJP in development — Spear's Magazine, 2024
